chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-110 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 15.05.2023 Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar advocate for applicant. Mr. Adil Shahzad advocate for respondents No.5 and 9. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General along with Inspector Aamir Hussain Shah on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and ASI Jawan Khan on behalf of SHO PS Thebat. ----- This application is disposed of under the undertaking of Duty Officer ASI Jawan Khan who submits that in case final medico legal certificate is received from Medical Board and if some cognizable offence is made out he would register FIR and proceed with the matter in accordance with law. Parties are satisfied and this application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
